caveat: REAL-PUBLISHED-TLE GEOMETRY CHECK [UNVERIFIED currency/provenance]. Endpoints come from the production Executive + FilterStub against synthetic generator truth; no result is clamped or target-fitted. The elements were grok-fetched and were not independently confirmed against CelesTrak.

shells: Starlink published elements: 20 usable, inclination 53.0371-53.1608 deg
OneWeb published elements: 10 usable, inclination 87.8496-87.9078 deg
Iridium NEXT published elements: 10 usable, inclination 86.3927-86.3941 deg

controls.per_sv_transmit_bias_hz: deterministic [UNVERIFIED] signed 0.35-1.05 Hz, fixed per SV and seed
controls.dynamics: pnt-mission generator: 3 deg/s coordinated-turn command, wave/slam, and speed-scaled IMU at 7 kn [UNVERIFIED]
controls.geometry_isolation: A single persistent real-TLE cohort is selected once per mission. N tiers use nested prefixes, all satellites remain above 5 deg for every denied Doppler epoch, and no tier hands over; only simultaneous distinct LOS count changes. The sparse 40-element sample supports N=1 and N=2 only.

outcomes.geometry: fixed simultaneous multi-LOS cohort; no handover

headline: The 40-element real fixture supports only two persistent LOS over the controlled five-minute leg; an N=8 rerun is not physically available from this sparse sample.
diagnosis: N=8 was not run, so no multi-satellite accuracy conclusion is available.
